    -- Position: cos(П‰t) * xв‚Ђ + sin(П‰t)/П‰ * vв‚Ђ
    -- Need to show: вЂ–positionвЂ– = в€љ(вЂ–xв‚ЂвЂ–ВІ + (вЂ–vв‚ЂвЂ–/П‰)ВІ)
    sorry
  В· intro h
    rw [trajectory_velocity]
    rw [trajectory_eq] at h
    simp only at h вЉў
    sorry

constructor
  В· intro hv
    have henergy := trajectory_energy S IC
    have h0 := congrFun henergy 0
    have ht := congrFun henergy t
    simp only [energy, kineticEnergy, potentialEnergy] at h0 ht
    rw [trajectory_velocity, hv] at ht
    simp only [norm_zero, ne_eq, OfNat.ofNat_ne_zero, not_false_eq_true, zero_pow, mul_zero,
      zero_div, zero_add] at ht
    rw [trajectory_position_at_zero, trajectory_velocity_at_zero] at h0
    have hk : S.k > 0 := S.k_pos
    have hm : S.m > 0 := S.m_pos
    have hП‰ : S.П‰ > 0 := S.П‰_pos
    have hП‰2 : S.П‰ ^ 2 = S.k / S.m := S.П‰_sq
    rw [real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq, real_inner_self_eq_norm_sq] at h0 ht
    have heq : S.k / 2 * вЂ–IC.trajectory S tвЂ– ^ 2 = 
               1 / 2 * (S.m * вЂ–IC.vв‚ЂвЂ– ^ 2 + S.k * вЂ–IC.xв‚ЂвЂ– ^ 2) := by linarith
    have hnorm_sq : вЂ–IC.trajectory S tвЂ– ^ 2 = вЂ–IC.xв‚ЂвЂ– ^ 2 + (вЂ–IC.vв‚ЂвЂ– / S.П‰) ^ 2 := by
      field_simp at heq вЉў
      have : S.k * вЂ–IC.trajectory S tвЂ– ^ 2 = S.m * вЂ–IC.vв‚ЂвЂ– ^ 2 + S.k * вЂ–IC.xв‚ЂвЂ– ^ 2 := by linarith
      have hП‰k : S.m / S.k = 1 / S.П‰ ^ 2 := by field_simp [hП‰2]
      calc вЂ–IC.trajectory S tвЂ– ^ 2 * S.П‰ ^ 2 
          = (S.m * вЂ–IC.vв‚ЂвЂ– ^ 2 + S.k * вЂ–IC.xв‚ЂвЂ– ^ 2) / S.k * S.П‰ ^ 2 := by field_simp [this]
        _ = S.m / S.k * вЂ–IC.vв‚ЂвЂ– ^ 2 * S.П‰ ^ 2 + вЂ–IC.xв‚ЂвЂ– ^ 2 * S.П‰ ^ 2 := by ring
        _ = вЂ–IC.vв‚ЂвЂ– ^ 2 + вЂ–IC.xв‚ЂвЂ– ^ 2 * S.П‰ ^ 2 := by rw [hП‰k]; ring
        _ = (вЂ–IC.xв‚ЂвЂ– ^ 2 + вЂ–IC.vв‚ЂвЂ– ^ 2 / S.П‰ ^ 2) * S.П‰ ^ 2 := by ring
        _ = (S.П‰ ^ 2 * вЂ–IC.xв‚ЂвЂ– ^ 2 + вЂ–IC.vв‚ЂвЂ– ^ 2) := by ring
    rw [Real.sqrt_eq_iff_sq_eq]
    В· exact hnorm_sq
    В· apply add_nonneg <;> apply sq_nonneg
    В· exact norm_nonneg _
  В· intro hnorm
    sorry

constructor
  В· intro hv

    rw [trajectory_eq]
    simp only
    -- The velocity being zero means: -П‰ * sin(П‰t) * xв‚Ђ + cos(П‰t) * vв‚Ђ = 0
    -- This gives us: П‰ * sin(П‰t) * xв‚Ђ = cos(П‰t) * vв‚Ђ
    -- The position is: cos(П‰t) * xв‚Ђ + sin(П‰t)/П‰ * vв‚Ђ
    -- Using energy conservation and the constraint from zero velocity
    have henergy := trajectory_energy S IC
    have heom := trajectory_equationOfMotion S IC
    -- At zero velocity, all energy is potential

    -- So вЂ–xвЂ–ВІ = вЂ–xв‚ЂвЂ–ВІ + (m/k) * вЂ–vв‚ЂвЂ–ВІ = вЂ–xв‚ЂвЂ–ВІ + вЂ–vв‚ЂвЂ–ВІ/П‰ВІ
    sorry
  В· intro hpos

    have h2 : sin (S.П‰ * t.val) вЂў IC.xв‚Ђ = (cos (S.П‰ * t.val) / S.П‰) вЂў IC.vв‚Ђ := by
      have := congrArg (fun x => (1/S.П‰) вЂў x) h1

constructor

    have hП‰ : S.П‰ в‰  0 := S.П‰_neq_zero
    have h1 : -S.П‰ вЂў sin (S.П‰ * t.val) вЂў IC.xв‚Ђ + cos (S.П‰ * t.val) вЂў IC.vв‚Ђ = 0 := h
    have hsin : sin (S.П‰ * t.val) вЂў IC.xв‚Ђ = (cos (S.П‰ * t.val) / S.П‰) вЂў IC.vв‚Ђ := by
      have : -S.П‰ вЂў sin (S.П‰ * t.val) вЂў IC.xв‚Ђ = -cos (S.П‰ * t.val) вЂў IC.vв‚Ђ := by
        linarith [show (-S.П‰ вЂў sin (S.П‰ * t.val) вЂў IC.xв‚Ђ + cos (S.П‰ * t.val) вЂў IC.vв‚Ђ : Space 1) = 0 from h1]
      simp only [neg_smul] at this
      have h2 : S.П‰ вЂў sin (S.П‰ * t.val) вЂў IC.xв‚Ђ = cos (S.П‰ * t.val) вЂў IC.vв‚Ђ := by
        have := neg_eq_iff_eq_neg.mp this

      calc sin (S.П‰ * t.val) вЂў IC.xв‚Ђ 
          = (1 / S.П‰) вЂў (S.П‰ вЂў sin (S.П‰ * t.val) вЂў IC.xв‚Ђ) := by simp [smul_smul]; field_simp
        _ = (1 / S.П‰) вЂў (cos (S.П‰ * t.val) вЂў IC.vв‚Ђ) := by rw [h2]
        _ = (cos (S.П‰ * t.val) / S.П‰) вЂў IC.vв‚Ђ := by simp [smul_smul]; ring_nf
    sorry
  В· intro h
